content:
🚀 Jauth | Go
🎯 Primary Use Case: Securing and managing access to self-hosted applications through a lightweight reverse proxy with flexible authorization methods.
✨ Key Features: • Single binary executable • SSL/TLS encryption (self-signed or Let's Encrypt) • User authorization via SSH or Telegram • Optional Single Sign-On • Whitelist-based access control
📖 Summary: Jauth is a Go-based, lightweight SSL/TLS reverse proxy designed to secure self-hosted applications. It provides authorization through SSH or Telegram and supports Single Sign-On (SSO), simplifying access management for internal services.
🔗 Links: • View Project ================ 🔓 Open Source
